docs.title: About Yukti Shaala
docs.text: Welcome! This is my knowledge base for deep learning.

docs.title: What I Do
docs.text: I explore and write about: - Distributed Systems - Building reliable systems across networks - Machine Learning - From fundamentals to cutting-edge techniques - Operations Research - Mathematical optimization and decision-making - Interactive Applications - Games, graphics, and simulations - Management & Strategy - Building and scaling products

docs.title: Why I Write
docs.text: I believe in learning through deep exploration. Each article is a "grok" - a deep understanding of a concept from first principles.

docs.title: Latest Articles
docs.text:
Browse the sections above to explore content on: - Distributed Systems - Machine Learning - Operations Research - Interactive Applications - Management

Each section has been carefully structured to build your understanding from fundamentals to advanced concepts.

Enjoy exploring! 🚀

docs.title: Distributed Systems
docs.text: A comprehensive guide to building and understanding distributed systems.

docs.title: What You'll Learn
docs.text:
• Consistency models and CAP theorem
  • Consensus algorithms (Raft, Paxos)
  • Replication strategies
  • Leader election
  • Real-world implementations

docs.title: Why This Matters
docs.text: Distributed systems power modern infrastructure: databases, cloud services, microservices, blockchain. Understanding these concepts is essential for backend engineers and system designers.

docs.title: Structure & Chapters
docs.text: This section contains 9 chapters organized in 3 subsections:

docs.title: Fundamentals (2 chapters)
docs.text:
• Introduction to Distributed Systems
  • Challenges & Concepts

docs.title: Consistency & Data (2 chapters)
docs.text:
• Consistency Models
  • CAP Theorem

docs.title: Algorithms & Practice (5 chapters)
docs.text:
• Consensus Algorithms
  • Replication
  • Leader Election
  • Building a Distributed System
  • Common Pitfalls

docs.title: Where to Start
docs.text: Begin with Introduction to Distributed Systems

docs.title: Interactive Applications
docs.text: Build games, graphics, and physics simulations.

docs.title: What You'll Learn
docs.text:
• Game development and game engines
  • Graphics rendering and shaders
  • Ray tracing
  • Physics simulation and collision detection
  • Rigid body and soft body dynamics

docs.title: Why This Matters
docs.text: Interactive applications combine creativity with technical depth. Essential for game developers, graphics programmers, and creative technologists.

docs.title: Why This Matters
docs.text: Machine learning is transforming how we solve problems across industries. Understanding these fundamentals is crucial for data scientists and ML engineers.

docs.title: Operations Research

docs.text:

  • Network problems

docs.title: Why This Matters
docs.text: Operations research provides powerful tools for decision-making and optimization. Essential for business analysts and quantitative professionals.
